summary: This is a brief event announcement for Cathy O'Neil's speaking engagement at the NYC Open Data Meetup. She will discuss her essay 'On Being a Data Skeptic' and her book 'Doing Data Science.' The post provides logistical details including time, location at Enigma HQ, and the evening's schedule.
key_points: O'Neil is presenting at NYC Open Data Meetup organized by Vivian Zhang
The talk focuses on her 'On Being a Data Skeptic' essay and 'Doing Data Science' book
The event includes networking, a workshop, and audience Q&A
money_quotes: I'll be discussing my essay from last year entitled On Being a Data Skeptic
key_insight: This event announcement promotes O'Neil's data skepticism work to the NYC open data community.
